author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: fix(maps): avoid cascade update (algolia/react-instantsearch#1358)
body:
* feat(Connector): expose enableRefineOnMapMove prop

* chore(eslintrc): allow rest ignore parameter

* feat(GeoSearch): provide enableRefineOnMapMove to Connector

* fix(Redo): avoid cascade update on didMount

* refactor(stories): pass options to GeoSearch for disable refinement on map move with Redo

* fix(Control): avoid cascade update on didMount

* refactor(stories): pass options to GeoSearch for disable refinement on map move with Control

* docs(GeoSearch): remove props for Control

* docs(GeoSearch): add enableRefineOnMapMove for GeoSearch
